issue.message: A newer version of com.android.library than 8.7.2 is available: 8.12.0. (There is also a newer version of 8.7.𝑥 available, if upgrading to 8.12.0 is difficult: 8.7.3)
A newer version of com.android.library than 8.7.2 is available: 8.12.0. (There is also a newer version of 8.7.𝑥 available, if upgrading to 8.12.0 is difficult: 8.7.3)
